title: Gmail OAuth2 fails with 401 Unauthorized during callback
symptom: During the OAuth callback for Gmail, n8n consistently returns a 401 Unauthorized error. Manual token exchange works, indicating the issue lies within n8n's OAuth implementation.
root_cause: The error occurs because the session validation fails during the OAuth callback, leading to `req.user` being undefined. This causes n8n to reject the OAuth attempts with a 401 Unauthorized response.
fix_steps: Add the environment variable N8N_SKIP_AUTH_ON_OAUTH_CALLBACK=true to your docker-compose.yml
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Add the specified environment variable to skip session validation during OAuth callbacks.
